title: Fix model routing for congress debates

log.context: Fix model routing for congress debates

All the `_call_congress_api` calls (for evolve, check_ibrahim, select_seats, create_tasks, vote) pass `identity` as the name, and the server-side handler uses that name to look up the model from the DB. Model routing is server-side and already works correctly.

The conclusion is clear: **the bug described in the task does not exist in the current codebase.** The model routing is already correctly implemented in `serve.py`'s `_handle_congress_post`:
